raw_prompt:
The Boss asks: "Compute OEE. Availability is 90% and Performance is 80%."
Quality rate is not provided.
raw_response:
METHOD: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
INPUTS:
  A  = 90%   [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  P  = 80%   [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  Q  = DATA UNAVAILABLE  [source: not provided - Quality rate]
FORMULA: OEE = A * P * Q
SUBSTITUTION: blocked - Q is DATA UNAVAILABLE
  Partial: A * P = 0.90 * 0.80 = 0.72
RESULT: DATA UNAVAILABLE
  Cannot complete OEE without Quality. Do NOT assume Q = 100%.
  Ask Boss for the Quality rate.
evidence_quotes: Computation block with Quality marked DATA UNAVAILABLE
